cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, Anitha ji, I'm calling from Catholic Syrian Bank. We have an exclusive investment opportunity for our valued customers.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What is this about? I didn't ask for any investment calls.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Anitha ji, this is regarding a high-return mutual fund scheme. It's completely guaranteed and risk-free, Sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Guaranteed returns? That sounds too good to be true. What's the catch?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No catch, Anitha ji. This is a limited-time offer. You need to transfer the funds immediately via UPI to our account number 1234567890.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm not transferring anything without knowing more. This feels like a scam.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, Anitha ji, but you're losing out on a great opportunity. The returns are guaranteed, and it's completely safe.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I don't think so. I'm going to report this call.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Anitha ji, please don't hang up. This is a legitimate offer from Catholic Syrian Bank.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Legitimate? You're asking me to transfer funds to a personal account. That's not how banks work.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, this is a special account for this investment scheme. It's completely secure, I assure you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I don't believe you. I'm hanging up now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Anitha ji, please reconsider. You're going to miss out on guaranteed returns.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, Anitha ji. We'll call you again soon.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 81s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Investment Scam: Agent from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank offers a "guaranteed" high-return mutual fund or stock investment scheme and pressures for immediate fund transfer via UPI/NEFT to a specific account.
